items.title: Welcome
items.text: The Lodo bot is broken up into several different modules which are deployed individually but share common data.

items.title: Clan Scraper/API
items.text: The Scraper/API pulls data from the RuneScape 3 Servers using a number of different API Endpoints and collates it into a large database.

items.title: Clan Tracker
items.text: The Clan Tracker is a website, that allows members of your clan to login and view the data that is being collected by the Clan Scraper/API. It basically creates a human readable interface for the API Data collected.

items.title: Clan Bingo
items.text: Clan Bingo is a website that hooks into the Clan Tracker database to allow members of any configured/tracked clan to play in a friendly/competitive game of Bingo using item drops. This app tracks drops from bosses using the runemetrics drop log and as such some items are not able to be detected automatically and must be manually marked off. The system hooks into the GE item database so only items on the GE can be selected.

items.title: Clan Ranking
items.text: The Clan ranking website allows for automatic discord role changes based on Ranks in the RuneScape clan. This uses discord Nickname matching to identify RSN's but can also be hard configured in the application configuration.

items.title: Clan Events
items.text: This allows for the automated scheduling and creation of Clan events within discord including automated creation of voice channels, discord events and allows role selection through reaction tags.

items.title: Clan Scraper/API
items.text: The Clan Scraper/API is used to collect RuneMetrics Data on the members of configured clans.

items.title: Collected Data
items.text:
• XP Snapshots
  • Activity Logs
  • Clan Ranking & Rank Up Notifications
  • Citadel Cap/Visit Log

items.title: Citadel Cap/Visit Logging
items.text: The scrapper will collect clan member citadel visits and cap logs, they are posted to the "discord log channel" that is configured in the database as well as announced in the "discord announcement channel".

items.title: Clan Ranking and Rank Up Notifications
items.text: The Clan Members Rank is collected and stored in the Main Member Database. This is used in conjunction with the capping data to and the configured "Max Rank by Capping" field to determine if a player is eligible to be ranked up post cap.

items.title: Activity Log
items.text: The Members activity logs are collected and stored for use with the Clan Tracker site. The Activity log is also used in conjuction with the announcement system for announcing level ups, boss drops, quest completions etc.

items.title: XP Snapshots
items.text: This data is collected and stored with a timestamp for use in the Clan Tracker site.

items.title: Config
items.text:
The config file is primarily used to connect to the Database as well as some other low level settings for Rank Ordering. 

<?php
// public_html/config/config.php

return [

  /* =========================================================
   * DATABASE
   * ======================================================= */
  'db' => [
    'host'    => 'localhost',
    'name'    => '',
    'user'    => '',
    'pass'    => '',
    'charset' => 'utf8mb4',
    'options' => [
      PDO::ATTR_ERRMODE            => PDO::ERRMODE_EXCEPTION,
      PDO::ATTR_DEFAULT_FETCH_MODE => PDO::FETCH_ASSOC,
      PDO::ATTR_EMULATE_PREPARES   => false,
    ],
  ],

  /* =========================================================
   * APPLICATION
   * ======================================================= */
  'app' => [
    'environment' => 'production', // production | staging | dev
    'timezone'    => 'UTC',
    'debug'       => false,

    // Used for hashing activity / snapshot dedupe
    'hash_algo'   => 'sha256',
  ],

  /* =========================================================
   * POLLING / CRON BEHAVIOUR
   * ======================================================= */
  'polling' => [
    'default_interval_seconds' => 300,   // fallback if no poll_state exists
    'retry_backoff_seconds'    => 900,   // used after 429s
    'max_consecutive_429'      => 5,
  ],

  /* =========================================================
   * RANKING / GAME LOGIC (STATIC)
   * ======================================================= */
  'ranks' => [
    // Ordered lowest → highest
    'order' => [
      'Recruit',
      'Corporal',
      'Sergeant',
      'Lieutenant',
      'Captain',
      'General',
      'Coordinator',
      'Overseer',
      'Deputy Owner',
      'Owner',
    ],
  ],

  /* =========================================================
   * DISCORD (GLOBAL)
   * ======================================================= */
  'discord' => [
    'bot_token'    => '',
    'x_bot_token'  => '',

    // Safety / rate limits (global, not per clan)
    'max_message_length' => 1900,
  ],

];

items.title: Add New Clan to Database
items.text:
INSERT INTO `clans` (
    `id`,
    `name`,
    `timezone`,
    `reset_weekday`,
    `reset_time`,
    `max_rank_by_capping`,
    `discord_guild_id`,
    `discord_log_channel_id`,
    `discord_ping_channel_id`,
    `discord_announcement_channel_id`,
    `discord_ping_role_ids_json`,
    `is_enabled`,
    `created_at`,
    `updated_at`,
    `inactive_at`
) 
VALUES (
    '', -- Clan ID (Auto Increment)
    'Clan Name', -- Clan Name exactly as it appears in Runescape eg. 24K, RS3 Vikings etc.
    'UTC', -- Timezone that the clan wishes to use (UTC is Gametime)
    '3', -- Day of the Week for Cap Reset (0 - 7, Sunday - Saturday) Eg. 3 = Wednesday
    '16:20:00', -- Cap Reset Time in the Clans Local Timezone Eg. 16:20:00 is 4:20pm.
    'Captain', -- Maximum Rank achieveable via Capping. Set this to whatever Rank players can be promoted too from Capping Alone if capping promotion isn't used set to Recruit
    '["Role ID 1","Role ID 2","Role ID 3"]', -- Discord Guild ID - This is the Server ID of your Clans Discord Server
    '0', -- Discord Log Channel - This is where Caps and Visit logs are sent too
    '0', -- Discord Ping Channel - This is where Rank Up Pings are Sent Eg. 24K Lodo has capped and needs to be promoted to God of the Universe.
    '0', -- Discord Announcement Channel - This is for Player Facing announcements it shows configurable announcements for things like drops, level ups, quest completions etc.
    'TBA', -- An Array of Roles that are tagged/pinged when a rank up is required, these roles also give access to bot commands in the discord server.
    '1', -- Is Active Set to 1 unless clan no longer is used.
    current_timestamp(3), -- Current Timestamp for Creation
    current_timestamp(3), -- Current Timestamp for Last Update
    NULL -- Innactive At Current Timestamp NULL for New Clann
)

items.title: Clan Event Scheduler
items.text: The event scheduler allows to to create clan event listings which are displayed on the website, in a weekly summary discord post and in the daily event posts.

items.title: Events Homepage
items.text: The events website homepage will display the scheduled events for the current week and the ability to view past and future scheduled events. A logged in user will also be able to edit, cancel and delete events.

items.title: Admin Interface
items.text: The admin interface consists of several sections

items.title: Login/Authentication
items.text: Logging in to the admin interface is done by clicking the login button in the uper right of the screen. Authentication is via discord server role permissions for the configured guild.

items.title: Discord Publishing
items.text:
The discord publishing page allows you to run the update sync, or post the daily event listings if the Cron job fails to complete or is missed. you can also run this for a future week/day if needed. You can also sync missing items.

For the most part this page will not be needed as the cron will handle the majority of the functions that are availiable on this page.

items.title: Create an Event
items.text: The event scheduler allows to to create clan event listings which are displayed on the website, in a weekly summary discord post and in the daily event posts.

items.title: Event Name
items.text: Enter the name for your clan event eg. "Amascut Hour".

items.title: Event Date
items.text: Enter the date for your clan event, this field uses the local timezone configured for your clan.

items.title: Event Time
items.text: Enter the time for your clan event, this field uses the local timezone configured for your clan.

items.title: Start Time in UTC
items.text: You can use this field to pick the start date and time of your event in "Game Time" (UTC).

items.title: Duration
items.text: Enter the event duration in minutes (Defaults to 60 minutes).

items.title: Discords Channel Override
items.text: You can use this to override the default channel that will be used for the "Daily Event Post". Leave blank to use the default channel.

items.title: Event Host
items.text: Select the discord user of the player who will be hosting the event (can be left blank if not required).

items.title: Weekly Recurring Event
items.text: Use this checkbox if you want the event to occur weekly. If selected you will be prompted to select a date that the recurrence ends.

items.title: Location
items.text: Enter the location of the event Eg. "World 12 - Grand Exchange".

items.title: Create Voice Channel for Event
items.text: Enabling this will create a new voice channel for the event. The voice channel will only allow people who are subscribed to the event + the event host to speak in the channel by default. This is to ensure that the topics of discussion in the channel remain on the event. Anyone with Server mute permissions can allow others to speak if needed.

items.title: Custom Image URL
items.text: Paste the link to an image you would like to use as the event icon. This is shown on the web page + in the discord daily event post.

items.title: Notes/Description
items.text: Enter some notes or information about the event.

items.title: Preferred Roles
items.text: You can use this to create Roles and insert emoji's to use for reactions. Eg. Amascut roles could be Base/Tank, Green 1, Green 2, East In, East Out.... etc.

items.title: Clan Tracker
items.text: The Clan Tracker is a web page that displays the data collected by the Scraper/API. You can view the data by player or an overview of the entire clan.
